title: Communauté de communes de l'Atrébatie
summary: The Communauté de communes de l'Atrébatie was located in the Pas-de-Calais département, in northern France. It was created in January 1999. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes des Campagnes de l'Artois in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes de l'Atrébatie was located in the Pas-de-Calais département, in northern France. It was created in January 1999. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes des Campagnes de l'Artois in January 2017.

Composition
It comprised the following 27 communes:
